name: Papertrail
description: Monitor Papertrail log management for logging infrastructure and monitoring compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Papertrail at https://papertrailapp.com
2. Go to Profile (top right)
3. Copy your API Token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Papertrail → Profile → API Token

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Papertrail saved searches and alerts are configured for log monitoring

checks.name: Utility Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies Papertrail log sources are actively ingesting logs
